title: Golden Globes Best Actor Drama - Polymarket Predictions
text: Polymarket prediction market data for the 2026 Golden Globes Best Actor Drama category showed Wagner Moura at approximately 72-73 percent winning probability, with Michael B. Jordan at roughly 24-25 percent. The market-driven insights reflected strong consensus among bettors and prediction market participants. Polymarket partnered with the Golden Globes to provide real-time odds across 30 awards show categories. Fans bet nearly $2.5 million in contracts across the various categories for the 83rd Golden Globe Awards. The category featured nominees including Dwayne Johnson, Jeremy Allen White, Joel Edgerton, Michael B. Jordan, Oscar Isaac, and Wagner Moura for his role in The Secret Agent.
